title: Fodder For Cannon
content:
Bodies glad, erect,
    Beautiful with youth,
    Life's elect,
    Nature's truth,
    Marching host on host,
    Those bright, unblemished ones,
    Manhood's boast,
    Feed them to the guns.

    Hearts and brains that teem
    With blessing for the race,
    Thought and dream,
    Vision, grace,
    Oh, love's best and most,
    Bridegrooms, brothers, sons,
    Host on host
    Feed them to the guns.
meaning:
"Fodder For Cannon" is a quintessential example of Katharine Lee Bates's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
